ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the ERC20 contract */,
  "creator_address" TEXT /* Address of the creator of the contract */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was deployed */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of tokens defined in the contract */,
  "contract_version" TEXT /* Version of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, deprecated, paused) */,
  "deployment_transaction_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash of the contract deployment */,
  "upgradable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract is upgradable */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler used for deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract to which the function belongs */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the function (e.g., public, private) */,
  "is_constant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the function is constant (true/false) */,
  "returns" TEXT /* Return type of the function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the function's purpose */,
  "input_parameters" TEXT /* List of input parameters required by the function */,
  "gas_estimate" REAL /* Estimated gas cost for executing the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifiers" (
  "modifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modifier */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function that uses this modifier */,
  "modifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the modifier */,
  "modifier_description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose of the modifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifiers_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the auditor */,
  "audit_report_link" TEXT /* Link to the detailed audit report */,
  "vulnerabilities_found" TEXT /* List of vulnerabilities identified during the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function invoked during the transaction */,
  "sender_address" TEXT /* Address of the sender */,
  "receiver_address" TEXT /* Address of the receiver */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of tokens transferred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  "gas_used" REAL /* Actual gas used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)
